title: Garlicky Bean Medley
description: A flavorful and nutritious medley of beans and vegetables, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Chewy
ingredients.notes: dried beans, such as chickpeas or black beans

ingredients.name: Energizing
ingredients.notes: frozen vegetables, such as broccoli or bell peppers

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the dried beans and frozen vegetables to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Stir in the unsalted butter until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
